question: Which of the following, if required, must the shipper put on the package.
canonical_answer:
a. The required label
b. The hazardous materials shipping name and identification number
c. The name and address of shipper or consignee
d. All of the above

D

appears_in.title: Cdl Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: the required label, the hazardous materials shipping name and ID, the name and address of shipper
